issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is incorrect. This is a static ability that checks a condition at play time, should use 'OnPlay' or be a passive condition check, not a generic 'Trigger'
Actions describe trashing Supernovas and playing self, which is completely unrelated to card text. Card text requires: GiveKeyword action with keyword 'Rush' when life condition is met

Condition is 'Always'. Should be a life comparison condition: opponent's Life > your Life (no direct condition type exists for this; requires custom or workaround). Current condition does not match 'less Life cards than opponent'

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have less Life cards than your opponent, this Character gains [Rush].
